src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/DaveBacke.general_idea: Add ShedLock annotation to enable distributed scheduler locking for scheduled tasks.
Reformat annotation arguments to use multi-line style for better readability.
Reformat annotation arguments to use multi-line style for better readability.
Reformat annotation arguments to use multi-line style for better readability.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Reformat method signature indentation and javadoc whitespace for consistency.
Remove unused import for JoinConfig as it is no longer explicitly typed.
Remove unused import for CustomUserInfoTokenServices as the authentication cache configuration was removed.
Add Lombok Slf4j import to enable logging annotations.
Rename cache constant from SUCHE_ZAEHLSTELLE to SUCHE_ERHEBUNGSSTELLE to align with domain terminology.
Rename cache constant from SUCHE_ZAEHLSTELLE_DATENPORTAL to SUCHE_ERHEBUNGSSTELLE_DATENPORTAL to align with domain terminology.
Remove hardcoded authentication cache expiration time constant as the cache is being removed.
Remove hardcoded max idle time constant to replace it with configurable values.
Add configurable max idle time for search results via @Value annotation.
Add configurable max idle time for counting data via @Value annotation.
Add Slf4j annotation to enable logging in the configuration class.
Update local profile to include docker and unittest profiles.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for Config instance in localConfig.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for JoinConfig instance.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for IntegrityCheckerConfig instance in localConfig.
Add logging statements to log Hazelcast configuration values in the config bean.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for Config instance in config bean.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for IntegrityCheckerConfig instance in config bean.
Remove authentication cache configuration as it is no longer needed.
Update map config for search results to use new constant and configurable idle time.
Update map config for search results datenportal to use new constant and configurable idle time.
Update map config for belastungsplan to use configurable idle time.
Update map config for processed zaehldaten to use configurable idle time.
Update map config for zaehldaten zeitreihe to use configurable idle time.
Update map config for read zaehlstelle dto to use configurable idle time.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for MapConfig instance.
Set backup count to 0 for map configuration to disable backups.
Reorder imports to place standard library imports before third-party imports.
Remove redundant blank lines between imports and class declaration.
Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from deprecated fluent API to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6+.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The methods `antMatcher`, `authorizeRequests`, and the chained `.and()` syntax are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security headers configuration from deprecated fluent API to lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The method `frameOptions()` returning a builder that allows `.disable()` via chaining is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Add imports for new Spring Security configuration classes used in the lambda DSL.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The new configuration syntax references `AbstractHttpConfigurer`, `HeadersConfigurer`, and `AntPathRequestMatcher`, which are not imported in the original file.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x / JDK 21 context).

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Replace Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor with an explicit constructor to manually instantiate CustomJwtAuthenticationConverter with new dependencies.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The class no longer uses Lombok's annotation processor to generate the constructor; without the explicit constructor, the bean cannot be instantiated with the required arguments.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HTTP configuration from deprecated fluent API (antMatcher/authorizeRequests) to the new lambda-based DSL (authorizeHttpRequests/requestMatchers).
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The methods antMatcher, authorizeRequests, and antMatchers are removed in Spring Security 6 (required for Spring Boot 3/JDK 21), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server configuration from deprecated fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.why_exists: The method jwt() on OAuth2ResourceServerConfigurer is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Add header configuration to allow same-origin framing, likely for H2 console compatibility in newer Spring Security versions.
Add CSRF exclusion for H2 console endpoints using the new lambda-based DSL.
Remove unused OAuth2 client manager bean and its associated imports, as they are no longer part of the security configuration.
